programs.title: Khakee
programs.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programs.title: Aan: Men At Work
programs.desc: On a mission to make Mumbai crime-free, DCP Hari Om Patnaik and his team fights against some corrupt politicians and their associates. In the process, their faith in law and order is put to test.
